description_long: This is a brown paper grocery bag with a rectangular base and vertical sides, commonly used for carrying groceries or takeout food. The front and back surfaces are printed with red text, prominently displaying the brand 'Heladeria Americana' along with contact information and a logo. The bag is made from a single sheet of kraft paper, folded and glued at the seams, with visible creases and folds indicating it is currently empty or nearly empty. The side panels are gusseted, allowing the bag to expand when filled, and the bottom is flat for stability when placed on a surface. No handles are visible, and the top opening is wide and unobstructed, suitable for easy loading and unloading of items.
description: A brown paper grocery bag with red branding and a flat, gusseted design, currently empty and open at the top. The bag features printed text and a logo on the front and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Heladeria Americana' branding and contact information in red on the brown paper surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the gusseted panel and the triangular fold at the base, with partial red text visible.
description_view_2: Back view, nearly identical to the front, with the same branding and contact details clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gusseted panel and triangular base fold, with partial red text.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Red printed branding with 'Heladeria Americana' and contact information on the front and back.
